user.title: Veolia Water
user.description: Sign in to your Veolia / Sorea customer portal.

data_description.portal_url: Override the portal base URL. Leave as default for Veolia Catalonia.

error.cdn_blocked: The portal's CDN returned a block (HTTP 403/429). Try again later.
